title: Double Dragon Clear Packaging Tape – 48mm wide, 66m long (3 Rolls) | Heavy Duty Parcel Cellotape | Secure Sticky Sealing Tape for Parcel Boxes, Moving Boxes, Large Postal Bags & long-term storage
features: ✅ 3 ROLLS – 48x 66M: Includes a value pack of 3 clear rolls, each roll measuring 48mm in width and 66 metres in length—perfect for high-volume use at home, in warehouses, offices, or during house moves.

✅ EXTRA STRONG: With 45-micron thickness, this durable tape grips firmly to cardboard, plastic, and other surfaces—ensuring boxes, parcels, and bags stay securely sealed during shipping, handling, or storage, while withstanding wear and tear.

✅ LONG-LASTING ADHESION: Featuring water-based acrylic glue, this tape offers excellent resistance to ageing, weathering, sunlight, and discoloration. With superior UV stability, it won't yellow over time—making it ideal for long-term storage and cartons with extended shelf life. Its durable holding power ensures secure sealing even after prolonged periods

✅ VERSATILE & NEAT: Ideal for sealing moving boxes, shipping cartons, storage containers, and postal bags, this tape is perfect for both everyday use and long-term storage. Its transparent finish blends seamlessly with packaging, keeping labels, barcodes, and branding clearly visible for a clean, professional look without peeling or drying out.
✅ TRUSTED BRAND: Manufactured by Double Dragon, a name known for durable and reliable packaging solutions—designed to deliver consistent performance, roll after roll.
